testcase.name: getAccountBalancesV4
testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: a string containing "{\"result\":[{\"PastDue\":\"5847.60\",\"CurrentBalance\":\"0.00\",\"UnpostedBalance\":\"-90.99\",\"AmountDue\":\"5756.61\",\"AccountBalance\":\"5756.61\",\"OverShort\":\"0.00\",\"DepositAmount\":\"0.00\",\"DepositOutstandingAmount\":\"0.00\",\"InstallmentBudget\":\"0.00\",\"InstallmentSPA\":\"0.00\",\"LastPaymentDate\":\"2020-01-15\",\"LastPaymentAmount\":\"90.99\",\"LastDueDate\":\"2000-10-02\",\"LatestStatementDate\":\"2000-03-31\",\"LatestStatementAmount\":\"21.52\",\"IsMasterLocation\":false,\"IsIncludedLocation\":false}]}" Actual: {"AccountBalance":{"Success":true,"Data":{"PastDue":21.52,"CurrentBalance":0.00,"UnpostedBalance":-90.99,"AmountDue":-69.47,"AccountBalance":5756.61,"OverShort":5826.08,"DepositAmount":0.00,"DepositOutstandingAmount":0.00,"InstallmentBudget":0.00,"InstallmentSPA":0.00,"LastPaymentDate":"2020-01-15","LastPaymentAmount":90.99,"LastDueDate":"2000-10-02","LatestStatementDate":"2000-03-31","LatestStatementAmount":21.52,"IsMasterLocation":false,"IsIncludedLocation":false},"Messages":[]}}
